iot.topicrule.CfnAbout: Use the `AWS::IoT::TopicRule` resource to declare an AWS IoT rule. For information about working with AWS IoT rules, see [Rules for AWS IoT](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot/latest/developerguide/iot-rules.html) in the *AWS IoT Developer Guide*.

iot.topicrule.Tags.Description: Metadata which can be used to manage the topic rule.  For URI Request parameters use format: ...key1=value1&key2=value2...  For the CLI command-line parameter use format: --tags "key1=value1&key2=value2..."  For the cli-input-json file use format: "tags": "key1=value1&key2=value2..."
